parameter.name: precision
parameter.label: Precision
parameter.description: Optional. Number of significant digits to round to before applying scale.

parameter.name: scale
parameter.label: Scale
parameter.description: Scale: for numeric values it sets the number of decimal places; for DateTime values it selects the rounding unit: 0=DAYS, 1=HOURS, 2=MINUTES, 3=SECONDS, 4=MILLIS.

parameter.name: mode
parameter.label: Rounding Mode
parameter.description: Rounding mode to be used (e.g., "UP", "DOWN", "CEILING", "FLOOR", "HALF_UP", or "HALF_DOWN").
